allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Mode, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== cmd dir ==="; cmd /c dir /a)

PowerShell($c = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 1080 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 1080 listening: $\($c.TcpTestSucceeded\)"; Write-Output "=== direct connectivity test to github \(no proxy\) ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -Proxy $null; "github.com reachable directly: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Direct github.com: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
